llm_summary.summary: Pedro Cao Eiriz is associated with a Spanish phone number (+34617758559) and a Gmail address (pedrocaoeiriz@gmail.com), with a provided address at Passeig Maragall 13, Entresuelo 1, Barcelona, ES. A secondary work email, pedro.cao@xuxescompany.com, is linked to a GitHub account and a Twitter account, suggesting a professional association with a company named Xuxes. The phone number is registered to an iCloud account. The Gmail address has been found active on platforms including KuCoin, Adobe, and Microsoft Account. Both the Gmail and work email appear in two data breaches dated 2017 and 2018 (Taringa and 8fit), with an exposed weak-hash password from the Taringa breach. The primary email address was also found in the Phone House España breach record. No employment details, job title, or business ownership could be confirmed. No debt amount, debt origin, case age, or prior call history is recorded for this case.

breaches_details.details: 8fit, a popular fitness and health app, experienced a data breach. The breach occurred in early 2021, with the database made public later in June. The leaked data included email addresses and usernames, along with salted MD5 password hashes.

Data breach that occurred at Taringa, a Latin American social network in 2018. The data breach was the result of a hacking incident in which the personal information of over 28 million users was exposed. The data that was compromised included email addresses, hashed passwords, and personal information such as names, birth dates, and location data.
